pair_code_logic.normalization: upper(trim()) server-side; client-side normalizePairCodeInput handles URL/raw/8-char forms
findings: P1 F2: 32-bit entropy + per-user rate limit (not per-IP). Anonymous signups uncapped, so horizontal scaling defeats rate limit. Practical risk low at current scale (~1 in 430k per guess at ~10k family scale) but recommend IP-based limit + captcha for v1.1.

selectedChild_isolation.stale_state_handling: selectedChildUserIdRef in App.jsx:1625/1645/1869 guards in-flight realtime callbacks against swap-races. Stale selectedChildId cleared by isSelectedChildIdStale on family membership change.

logout_unpair.unpair_fallback_path: src/lib/auth.js:655-664 (bare family_members.delete + warning log) — may leave stale push tokens during RPC-missing deploy lag

co_parent.permission_scope: SELECT all + add_sticker(praise) + memo_replies + family_members own-row update. NO events INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE (gated by is_primary_parent which checks families.parent_id only).

concerns: P1 F1: fm_upd policy WITH CHECK (user_id = auth.uid()) has no column restriction; role text column has no CHECK constraint. Child can PATCH own row to role='parent'. Escalation does NOT grant events write (is_primary_parent gates) but DOES grant subscriptions write (tier bypass), force_ring trigger, child-photos storage write, daily_supplies write, add_sticker parent-branch, fm_del via is_family_parent.

anon_rpc_probe.message_starts_with: 부모 계정만 연동 코드를 재생성할 수 있어요

anon_rpc_probe.note: REVOKEd from anon at migration level
executable by anon but underlying memos UPDATE RLS prevents state change with arbitrary p_user_id/family_id/date_key

runtime_pairing_evidence: NOT_VERIFIED — awaits user manual pairing (Agent 07 stalled at OAuth)

issues.title: Child can self-mutate family_members.role to 'parent' via PATCH
issues.description: fm_upd policy USING/WITH CHECK = (user_id = auth.uid()) has no column-level restriction. role text column has no CHECK constraint. Authenticated child can PATCH /rest/v1/family_members?id=eq.<own> with {"role":"parent"} and server accepts. Escalation does NOT grant events write (is_primary_parent uses families.parent_id only) but DOES grant subscriptions write (tier bypass), force_ring trigger, child-photos storage write, daily_supplies write, add_sticker parent branch, fm_del via is_family_parent.
issues.recommended_fix: Add BEFORE UPDATE trigger on family_members raising on role change; OR rewrite fm_upd WITH CHECK to include role = (SELECT role FROM family_members fm0 WHERE fm0.id = family_members.id); OR add CHECK constraint role IN ('parent','child') plus separate policy gating role transitions.

issues.title: Per-user rate limit defeated by unlimited anonymous signups
issues.description: pair_attempts rate limit (10/hr) is keyed on user_id. signInAnonymously is open without captcha so attacker spawns fresh anon sessions per attempt. 32-bit entropy keeps practical risk low (~1 in 430k per try at current ~10k family scale) but recommend IP-based limit.
issues.recommended_fix: Add IP-based rate limit via Edge Function wrapper around join_family RPC; OR bump pair code to 12 chars (48 bits); OR require captcha on signInAnonymously.

issues.title: mark_memo_read RPC executable by anon
issues.description: Anon can POST to /rpc/mark_memo_read returning 204 No Content. Underlying memos UPDATE RLS prevents arbitrary memo mutation so no exploit, but unnecessary attack surface and a useful primitive in chained attacks.
issues.recommended_fix: REVOKE EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.mark_memo_read(uuid, text, uuid) FROM anon.

issues.title: getMyFamily exposes pair_code to every family member including children
issues.description: src/lib/auth.js:518,562 returns pairCode in the payload to all members. A child device dump (rooted phone, browser DevTools, malicious sibling) reveals the live pair code allowing third party to join via join_family or join_family_as_parent.
issues.recommended_fix: Conditionally include pair_code only when membership.role === 'parent'; surface a manual reveal in parent UI if needed.

summary_line: STATUS=PARTIAL_VERIFIED | P0=0 P1=2 | static_PASS=5/5 rls_probe_PASS=26/26 rpc_probe_PASS=8/9
